text_block_list.name: El Condor Pasa
text_block_list.text:
Bueno! The day has finally come to make my
debut!

text_block_list.name: El Condor Pasa
text_block_list.text:
This super rookie is ready to take on the world! A
spicy young star exploding onto the scene from
abroad! Like tan tan ramen!

text_block_list.name: El Condor Pasa
text_block_list.text:
By the way, tan tan ramen is spicy, but it's no
Mexican food!

text_block_list.name: El Condor Pasa
text_block_list.text:
Anywaaay, let's get going! I'm sure the paddock is
gettin' a lot of attention from the international
media!

text_block_list.name: King Halo
text_block_list.text: There's no need to hold back! Go all out!

text_block_list.name: El Condor Pasa
text_block_list.text: Oooh! All of my classmates are here too!

text_block_list.name: El Condor Pasa
text_block_list.text: Pero... qué? Where's the international media?

text_block_list.name: El Condor Pasa
text_block_list.text:
It's my big day, Trainer! Where's the guy with
sunglasses and a pen in his mouth?!

text_block_list.name: El Condor Pasa
text_block_list.text:
Did something happen? Is it really okay if they
miss my debut?!

text_block_list.name: El Condor Pasa
choice_data_list: To be fair, that kind of attention would be a little unusual for a first match...

text_block_list.name: El Condor Pasa
text_block_list.text:
What?! But I'm no ordinary rookie! Is the world
blind to my greatness?!

text_block_list.name: El Condor Pasa
text_block_list.text: This race is gonna be my legendary beginning!
choice_data_list: Well, the whole world can still watch.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
The URA is broadcasting the race online. I assure
her that if she races well, she'll be noticed.

text_block_list.name: El Condor Pasa
text_block_list.text:
Ohhh! That's right! Then, I'm totally fine. My
legendary debut will be witnessed all over the
world! Even back home!

text_block_list.name: El Condor Pasa
text_block_list.text:
I've got this! With my incredible talent, energy,
and ability, I'll show them a race they won't soon
forget!
